meta.scope: Dual-audience: solo-founder tool now, future SaaS for indie hackers/small teams

rivalry.note: Linear/Notion/Asana/ClickUp/Airtable all shipped autonomous AI agents 2025-2026. 20 credible players with overlapping surfaces.

new_entrants.note: AI lowered build cost. Operately v1.0→v1.5 in 9mo. Vibe Kanban 0→25K stars in 9mo.

substitutes.note: Spreadsheets, Notion DBs, Trello, GitHub Projects. Claude Code + markdown is a real substitute for AI-forward founders.

buyer_power_smb.note: Generous free tier race. Low switching costs.

buyer_power_enterprise.note: SSO/audit/admin lock-in. Not LaunchPad's concern yet.

supplier_power.note: Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini pricing leverage. AI-credit compression trend. Infra abundant.

threats: Linear Agent + Notion Custom Agents commoditize 'AI teammate'
Incumbents copy AI-chat UX with distribution

strengths: Best template library (Product Launch Checklist, GTM Strategy)

_thematic.other_incumbents: Linear, Trello, Airtable — strong compliance + ecosystems but not purpose-built for launch. All have AI. None have launch-stage templates.
_thematic.ai_native_long_tail: Tana, Superthread, Plane, workstreams.ai, Taskade, Motion, Vibe Kanban, Chordio — deep AI or niche focus, mostly capital-constrained, none cover portfolio-of-apps-with-launch-stages. Vibe Kanban is a partner not competitor.
_thematic.adjacent: WIP, Sunsama, Capacities — own partial niches but none have real PM + launch. WIP owns the audience; others don't.

positioning_map.insight: Solo-founder-first + launch-lifecycle-specific quadrant is EMPTY. LaunchPad owns it uncontested. Threat vectors: Operately (could add launch templates) or WIP (owns audience, could add PM).

jobs: Track portfolio of side projects in one place
Guide me through launching a product for the first time
Show real-time analytics per launched product
Delegate tasks to AI agents autonomously
Handoff work to Claude Code agent
jtbd.biggest_gap_for_launchpad: Delegate tasks to AI agents autonomously — competitors nail this, LaunchPad is only partial. Highest-leverage backlog item.

white_space.item: Built-in product analytics per launched product (PostHog)
white_space.status: LaunchPad owns this, extend to revenue/replays

white_space.evidence: WIP has partial ship log; nobody combines with PM
Operately Alfred is closest; nobody has launch-specific
LaunchPad pattern; nobody else formalized (Vibe Kanban is dev-only)
WIP touches; none integrate with PM

white_space.item: PostHog session replay embed per launched product

underserved_jtbd.job: Guide me through launching for the first time
underserved_jtbd.note: Only Asana partially via templates. LaunchPad's explicit phase pipeline is unique.

underserved_jtbd.job: Show real-time analytics per launched product
Handoff work to Claude Code agent
underserved_jtbd.note: Partial in Dart/Plane/Operately via MCP; LaunchPad feature-backlog pattern.
Only Operately and WIP nail it. LaunchPad should add streaks/check-ins.

adjacent_markets: Newsletter automation per product (Content Flywheel pattern)
AI-agent orchestration for non-code tasks (bridge to Vibe-Kanban territory)

pricing_packaging.evidence: Operately $82/mo 50 users, Taskade $19/mo 10 users. Per-seat hostile to solo founders with VAs.
Dart nails it. SaaS pivot should replicate.
Nobody offers this shape for indie hackers with 5-10 projects.

ux_polish: Command palette (cmd+k) — Linear, Notion, Height, Dart all have
Native mobile app — table stakes for SaaS
Public roadmap / changelog — Linear, Plane, Operately, Capacities, Sunsama have
Template marketplace — Notion, Asana, ClickUp have
integrations: Slack / Discord / Telegram notifications for launch-day
MCP server (Linear, Notion, Plane, Dart have)
ai_features: Chat-with-AI interface — every 2026 competitor has; LaunchPad has only strategy gen
Autonomous AI agents for task execution — table stakes
AI task auto-fill / subtask generation — Dart, Asana, Notion have
MCP server — exposes LaunchPad projects to Claude Desktop/Code
AI validation agent on new projects — run market scan + competitor audit + domain check
AI coach (Operately Alfred analog) — proactive from health score

backlog.title: Chat-with-AI interface for project + launch ops
backlog.description: Add conversational UI to dashboard that reads/writes projects, tasks, checklist items, launch phases via Anthropic API. Every 2026 competitor has this; LaunchPad only has one-shot launch strategy generation. This closes the single biggest perception gap vs Asana/Notion/Dart/Linear.
backlog.implementation_hints: New route /dashboard/chat or floating <AssistantPanel/>. Use Anthropic SDK with tool-use (project.list, project.update, task.create, checklist.toggle). Wrap existing /api/projects and /api/launches endpoints as tools. Project ai/launch-strategist.ts is the seed pattern.
acceptance_criteria: User can ask 'show me at-risk projects' and get a list
User can ask 'add a pre-launch audit to chessmind' and it creates the checklist
Tool calls stream with visible reasoning
Chat history persists per user across sessions

backlog.title: Autonomous AI agent delegation for launch tasks
backlog.description: Enable the launch-task generator to run agents that execute subtasks autonomously (e.g., 'write brand voice draft', 'generate Product Hunt copy', 'run competitor audit'). Asana Launch Planner, ClickUp Super Agents, Dart AI Agents all do this. LaunchPad's task generator is passive today.
backlog.implementation_hints: Extend lib/launches/task-generator.ts with task.auto_executable flag. New /api/launches/[id]/tasks/[taskId]/agent endpoint triggers Anthropic agent loop. Results persist as activity_log entries with source='agent'.
acceptance_criteria: Each task has an 'Agent' action if auto-executable
Clicking Agent opens a pane showing live agent reasoning
Agent output attaches to task as comment + asset
User can approve/reject agent work before marking done

backlog.title: Cross-project portfolio analytics dashboard
backlog.description: Aggregate PostHog analytics across all launches into a single dashboard: total visitors/signups/MRR across portfolio, per-project sparklines, cross-project comparison. LaunchPad has per-launch analytics; no one else does cross-project. This is a moat-deepening white-space feature.
backlog.implementation_hints: New /dashboard/analytics route. Aggregate /api/launches/[id]/analytics server-side. Use existing NumberTicker component. Consider Recharts sparklines per project card.
acceptance_criteria: Shows total active users, MRR, signups across all launches
Filter by stage (pre_launch vs launched vs scaling)

backlog.title: Native mobile app (Expo) — read-mostly MVP
backlog.description: Pipeline board + project detail + launch readiness score on iOS/Android. Linear/Notion/Asana/ClickUp all have native. Currently LaunchPad is web-only. Use /mobile-app skill with Expo + NativeWind.
backlog.implementation_hints: Run /mobile-app skill. Mirror dashboard routes. Supabase Auth with SecureStore. API calls via existing endpoints. RevenueCat for SaaS pivot.
acceptance_criteria: Project detail shows checklist, health, activity
Push notification when audit is due

backlog.title: MCP server exposing LaunchPad to Claude Desktop / Code
backlog.description: Expose projects, launches, checklist, features as MCP tools. Linear, Notion, Plane, Dart all have MCP. LaunchPad's audience uses Claude Code — this bridges the ecosystem.
backlog.implementation_hints: New /api/mcp/route.ts or separate Node worker. Expose tools: list_projects, get_project, create_feature, toggle_checklist_item, list_launches, update_launch_task. Reuse existing lib/supabase and lib/projects/types.
acceptance_criteria: User can install 'launchpad' MCP server in Claude Desktop
Claude can list projects, read health, add features
Auth via API key (stored per-user in launchdeck_api_keys)

backlog.title: Build-in-public public micro-site per project
backlog.description: Public /p/[slug] page showing project progress, milestones, latest activity — shareable on Twitter/LinkedIn. Attacks WIP's core offer (ship log + social). WIP has 3,694 makers LaunchPad could siphon.
backlog.implementation_hints: New /p/[slug]/page.tsx (public, no auth). Pull launchdeck_projects + launchdeck_activity_log (only public-flagged entries). SSR for SEO. Add 'is_public' to launchdeck_projects + 'is_public' per activity log entry.
acceptance_criteria: User can toggle project visibility to public
Public page shows project name, logo, stage, milestones, recent shipped items
OG image auto-generated (existing Satori pipeline from Content Flywheel)
Page ranks in Google for project name

backlog.title: AI launch coach — proactive recommendations from health score
backlog.description: Each project gets an 'Alfred'-style AI coach that reviews health score, audit findings, and checklist progress, then suggests next actions. Operately has Alfred for goals; nobody has it for launches.
backlog.implementation_hints: Extend lib/ai/launch-strategist.ts with 'coach' mode. Trigger on project detail load (cached 24hr). Return structured {blockers, next_actions, risk_flags}. Render in new <LaunchCoach/> widget.
acceptance_criteria: Each project shows 'Coach' panel with 3-5 recommendations
Click-to-action: creates feature or toggles checklist
Weekly summary email of coach insights

backlog.title: Public REST API + webhooks
backlog.description: Expose CRUD endpoints for projects, features, launches with bearer auth. Webhooks for project_created, stage_changed, launch_completed. Linear/Notion/Asana/ClickUp/Airtable/Plane all have. LaunchPad has none.
backlog.implementation_hints: Add launchdeck_api_keys table (user_id, key_hash, name). Middleware at /api/v1/* validates Bearer token. Add launchdeck_webhooks table (url, events, user_id). Emit from existing API routes.
acceptance_criteria: User can generate + revoke API keys in Settings
Webhook POSTs fire on project updates

backlog.title: Slack / Discord / Telegram launch-day notifications
backlog.description: When a launch enters week-0, notify on configured channel. Asana+Slack is deep; workstreams.ai is Slack-native. LaunchPad has none. Launch day is when a solo founder most wants accountability.
backlog.implementation_hints: Add launchdeck_integrations table. Use Slack incoming webhook URL, Telegram bot token, Discord webhook. Trigger on launch stage transition in /api/launches/[id] PATCH.
acceptance_criteria: Settings page to add Slack/Discord/Telegram hooks
Opt-in per integration + per event type

backlog.title: Template marketplace (user-shared launch playbooks)
backlog.description: Let users publish their project templates. Notion/Asana/ClickUp template galleries drive network effects. LaunchPad has 3 built-in templates; a marketplace lets community add launch playbooks.
backlog.implementation_hints: Add launchdeck_templates.is_public + author_id. Public /templates page lists community templates. 'Use this template' copies to user's account.
acceptance_criteria: User can publish custom template as public

backlog.title: Command palette (cmd+k)
backlog.description: Global fuzzy command palette: jump to project, run action, create item. Linear/Notion/Height/Dart all have. Signals 'fast tool' brand.
backlog.implementation_hints: Add <CommandPalette/> component (cmdk library). Index: all projects, launches, checklist actions, navigation. Keyboard shortcut cmd+k already reserved.
acceptance_criteria: Fuzzy search across projects, launches, commands
Can create new project from palette

backlog.title: Public roadmap + changelog page
backlog.description: Public /changelog shows recent shipped features. Public /roadmap shows upcoming. Linear/Plane/Operately/Capacities/Sunsama all do this. Trust signal + SEO.
backlog.implementation_hints: New /changelog/page.tsx reading from launchdeck_activity_log where source='release' OR flagged. /roadmap from launchdeck_features where project=launchpad-itself + is_public.

backlog.title: Zapier / Make integration
backlog.description: Publish LaunchPad to Zapier + Make directories. Triggers: project_created, stage_changed. Actions: add_feature, toggle_checklist. Table stakes — every incumbent has.
backlog.implementation_hints: Depends on Public REST API + webhooks shipping first. Build Zapier app (CLI), Make custom app. Submit to directories.

backlog.title: GitHub webhook integration
backlog.description: Pull GitHub commits/PRs/releases into project activity feed. LaunchPad's audience lives on GitHub. Linear/Plane have deep GitHub; LaunchPad has none.
backlog.implementation_hints: Add repo_url to launchdeck_projects (already in links). GitHub App with webhooks. Map to launchdeck_activity_log entries with source='github'. Optional auto-advance stage based on first deploy.
acceptance_criteria: Merged PR to main = activity entry
First Vercel deploy = auto-advance from 'building' to 'pre_launch'

backlog.title: Vercel integration (unique to LaunchPad audience)
backlog.description: Pull Vercel project deploys, domain status, build failures into activity feed. Nobody has this. LaunchPad's audience deploys to Vercel (including LaunchPad itself).
backlog.implementation_hints: Vercel API token per user. Link Vercel project_id to launchdeck_projects. Pull deploys via /v6/deployments. Surface domain status + last deploy in project card.
acceptance_criteria: Each LaunchPad project can map to a Vercel project
Last deploy shown on project card

backlog.title: Weekly digest email
backlog.description: Every Monday, email summarizing all projects: what shipped, what's at-risk, what's coming. Reengagement + context compression for busy solo founders.
backlog.implementation_hints: Vercel cron /api/cron/weekly-digest. Use Resend. Aggregate launchdeck_activity_log for last 7 days per user. Generate summary via Anthropic.

backlog.title: Goals / OKRs per project
backlog.description: Add a Goals concept to each project: success criteria, target date, progress. Operately has goals, Asana has goals, Linear has Initiatives. Table-stake for 2026 PM.
backlog.implementation_hints: New launchdeck_goals table (project_id, title, target_date, success_criteria, progress). UI in project detail. Consider rolling up to portfolio view.
acceptance_criteria: User can add goals to a project
Overdue goals surface as health deductions

backlog.title: Task dependencies + blockers
backlog.description: Mark a task as blocked by another. Asana/Linear/ClickUp/Airtable all have; Trello notably lacks. Signals real PM tool.
backlog.implementation_hints: Add blocks/blocked_by columns to launchdeck_features OR new launchdeck_feature_dependencies table. Show chain in UI. Block completion if prerequisites unmet.
acceptance_criteria: User can mark feature A blocks feature B
Cannot mark B done if A not done

backlog.title: Vibe Kanban bridge — show Claude Code session status per project
backlog.description: Pull Vibe Kanban state for each project's repo into LaunchPad activity. LaunchPad users run Claude Code — showing agent work in progress closes the loop. Partner-not-compete with Vibe Kanban.
backlog.implementation_hints: Since Vibe Kanban is local/self-hosted, use local file watcher OR user-configured webhook from their Vibe Kanban instance. Map to launchdeck_activity_log entries with source='vibe_kanban'.
acceptance_criteria: User can link project to Vibe Kanban repo path
Agent tasks appear in LaunchPad activity feed
Works offline via local file watch

backlog.title: Financial tracking per project (MRR, revenue, runway)
backlog.description: Add manual or Stripe-pulled revenue/MRR/cost per project. WIP has revenue metrics — closest competitor. Solo-founder key metric.
backlog.implementation_hints: New launchdeck_project_metrics table (project_id, date, metric_type, value). UI: manual entry + Stripe/Lemon Squeezy webhook. Chart in project detail.
acceptance_criteria: User can log MRR, revenue, cost

backlog.title: Export to markdown / PDF / CSV
backlog.description: Export project or launch plan as MD, PDF, CSV. Table-stake for data portability — reduces lock-in anxiety in SaaS buyers.
backlog.implementation_hints: New /api/projects/[slug]/export route. Use existing types. PDF via @react-pdf/renderer. CSV via stringify.
acceptance_criteria: Button on project detail: Export as MD/PDF/CSV
Full project data included (checklist, features, audits)

backlog.title: Competitor auto-audit as recurring audit type
backlog.description: Add 'competitor' to audit_types. Runs this very skill quarterly per project. Unique to LaunchPad's meta use case.
backlog.implementation_hints: Extend launchdeck_audits with audit_type='competitor'. Trigger runs this /competitor-analysis skill via a Claude API call. Store findings in launchdeck_audit_runs.
acceptance_criteria: SaaS template includes competitor audit (90-day interval)

backlog.title: Archive vs Sunset distinction
backlog.description: Current pipeline has 'archived' as terminal. Add 'sunset' to separate 'I actively stopped this' from 'I sold it' from 'I paused for later'. Portfolio founders hit this often.
backlog.implementation_hints: Add stage enums: 'paused', 'sunset', 'sold'. Update PipelineBoard columns. Migrate existing 'archived' into one of these.
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline board shows them as collapsed group

backlog.title: Health score trend line chart
backlog.description: Health score is currently a point-in-time number. Show trend over time so founders see trajectory.
backlog.implementation_hints: Snapshot launchdeck_projects.health_score daily via cron into launchdeck_health_history. Render sparkline in ProjectDetailModal using Recharts.

backlog.title: PostHog session replay embed per launched product
backlog.description: Extend launch analytics tab to include session replays. LaunchPad already integrates PostHog; adding replays deepens the analytics moat.
backlog.implementation_hints: Extend /api/launches/[id]/analytics to pull from PostHog /api/projects/{id}/session_recordings. Embed player in launch detail.
